arguments.content:
# Sprint 10 Stakeholder Sync — Meeting Agenda

**Meeting date & time:** 2026-04-23 10:00–10:45 (UTC+8)

## Attendees
- Alex Zhang — Backend Tech Lead
- Bai — Backend Engineer
- Chen — Frontend Engineer
- Dana — QA Engineer
- PM Stakeholders

## Agenda

### 1) Sprint 10 goals & scope confirmation (5 min)
- **Topics**: Sprint goal statement, in-scope/out-of-scope items, capacity assumptions
- **Expected outcome**: Agreement on Sprint 10 objectives and what will be delivered by end of sprint

### 2) Backlog review & priorities (15 min)
- **Topics**: Top backlog items, dependencies, acceptance criteria, ownership
- **Expected outcome**: Finalized Sprint 10 backlog ordering and clear assignees for each high-priority item

### 3) Risks & mitigations (10 min)
- **Topics**: Deployment complexity risk, performance-under-load risk, existing risks, mitigation plans
- **Expected outcome**: Updated risk owners, mitigation actions, and timelines for the two new Sprint 10 risks

### 4) Milestones, release plan & QA coverage (10 min)
- **Topics**: Key dates, release readiness checklist, regression scope, test environments
- **Expected outcome**: Confirmed milestone dates and QA plan aligned to release criteria

### 5) Open questions & decisions (5 min)
- **Topics**: Any unresolved scope questions, stakeholder asks, cross-team dependencies
- **Expected outcome**: Decision log items captured with owners and due dates
